map_id: A - Low Focality - Low Detail - Day 1

game_start.zh: 欢迎参加虚拟一周实验。我会在旁边陪伴你完成这个游戏。
game_start.en: Welcome to the Virtual Week experiment. I will accompany you through this game.
game_start.nl: Welkom bij het Virtual Week experiment. Ik zal je begeleiden tijdens dit spel.

first_roll.en: Please click the dice to start the game.
first_roll.nl: Klik op de dobbelsteen om te beginnen.

16.zh: 你已经走过了两个小时，继续加油。
16.en: You've passed two hours. Keep going.
16.nl: Je bent twee uur verder. Ga zo door.

60.zh: 已经是中午了，你做得很好。
60.en: It's noon now. You're doing great.
60.nl: Het is nu middag. Je doet het geweldig.

100.zh: 快要结束了，再坚持一下。
100.en: Almost there. Just a little more.

Breakfast.zh: 早餐时间到了，请做出你的选择。
Breakfast.en: It's breakfast time. Please make your choice.
Breakfast.nl: Het is ontbijttijd. Maak je keuze.

Shopping.zh: 现在是购物时间，请完成购物任务。
Shopping.en: It's shopping time. Please complete the shopping task.
Shopping.nl: Het is tijd om te winkelen. Voltooi de taak.

default.en: Well done. Please continue rolling the dice.
default.nl: Goed gedaan. Gooi de dobbelsteen opnieuw.

game_end.zh: 恭喜你完成了今天的虚拟一周！谢谢参与。
game_end.en: Congratulations on completing today's Virtual Week! Thank you for participating.
game_end.nl: Gefeliciteerd met het voltooien van de Virtual Week! Bedankt voor je deelname.

8.name: 早餐时间
8.description: 早餐时间到啦，请选择您的早餐。

32.name: 超市购物
32.description: 您需要去超市完成采购任务。

48.name: 邻居来访
48.description: 邻居 Brian 来了，询问能否帮忙。

irregular_tasks.description: 购物时，把干洗衣服送去。
中午 12:00 给银行打电话预约。
